title: SCP Secret Lab Keycards
description: Replaces SecurityCrafts Keycards with ones from SCP SL
body:
Replaces SecurityCrafts Keycards into keycards from SCP SL

Intended to Replace with the main upgrade path

Single Use is Replaced with Janitor Card

Level One is Replaced with Scientist Card

Level Two is Replaced with Major Scientist Card

Level Three is Replaced with Containment Engineer Card

Level Four is Replaced with Commander Card

And Level Five is Replaced with 05 Card



SecurityCraft is only on Forge so this pack only works on forge
